content.en:
True Dragon Cave Heaven.

This top overlord-level force is located in the True Dragon Sea.

The entire True Dragon Sea has a large number of Blood Transformation Realm races, all of which are attached to the True Dragon Cave Heaven, and they all have more or less dragon bloodlines.

At this time.

There is also a Bone Transformation Realm in the True Dragon Cave Heaven, and the other Blood Transformation Realm creatures still don't know that their True Dragon Lord has fallen.

At this moment, they were still cultivating, as usual.

Abrupt.

Above the True Dragon Cave sky, a figure tore through the void and came, and it was Ye Tian.

"Infinity Lord!"

The other nine Blood Transformation Realms of the True Dragon Cave Heaven were all recognized.

When they wanted to say something, Ye Tian made a move.

"True Dragon Cave Heaven, from today onwards, it will be destroyed!"

Ye Tian's voice spread throughout the entire True Dragon Sea, and countless Blood Transformation Realm races heard it.

"Hehe, who is this guy, he also threatened to destroy the True Dragon Cave Heaven, dare to provoke the True Dragon Cave Heaven like this, and look for death!"

"In the millions of primeval epochs I lived, there were many people who provoked the True Dragon Cave Heaven, and they all died one by one, and this time is no exception!"

"Hahaha, let's go over and see, which one is stunned, and if you have a little strength, you will provoke the real dragon cave sky!"

"Let's go, I'll check it out too!"

A group of blood transformation realms in the True Dragon Sea shuttled to the True Dragon Cave Heaven one after another.

But when they were about to arrive at the True Dragon Cave Heaven, they saw a scene that they would never forget.

Above the Endless Void, a spear fell.

Bang!!!!

The True Dragon Cave Heavenly Treasure Land covering the vast territory was directly pierced by a single blow, and it continued to crumble.

A large area of the void was shattered, and the territory around the True Dragon Cave Heaven was also shattering.

Before the Blood Transformation Realm creatures could fly out of the True Dragon Cave Heaven, they were swept away by the aftermath of the invisible force, and one by one they exploded their bodies and turned into blood mist.

The dense blood transformation realm creatures exploded in an instant, and they all died.

Among them, a Nine Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level genius had a great reputation in the True Dragon Sea, and he was an existence they looked up to in the past.

And these primordial-level geniuses of the Nine Blood Transformation Realms were now also turned into a cloud of blood mist in their perception, and they were directly killed by the aftermath.

Thundered!!!!

The True Dragon Cave Heaven continued to collapse, and soon disappeared completely.

All of the True Dragon Cave Heaven's Blood Transformation Realm creatures and Bone Transformation Realm were all gone, leaving only an abyss to replace the True Dragon Cave Heaven.

Wow!

Ye Tian's gaze came over, causing a group of blood transformation realms to kneel down one after another.

"Great Bone Transformation Realm Lord, we are not Blood Transformation Realm creatures of the True Dragon Cave Heaven, please don't kill us!"

This group of bone transformation realms trembled, for fear that Ye Tian would be unhappy, so he killed them.

In the face of an existence like Ye Tian, the True Dragon Cave Heaven was destroyed, where did they have room to resist.

Wow!

Ye Tian tore through the void with his hands and left, disappearing.

However, these Blood Transformation Realm creatures still didn't dare to move, and it wasn't until a long time later that they were sure that Ye Tian had really left and would not kill them.

"The True Dragon Cave Heaven has really been destroyed, something big has happened!"

These Blood Transformation Realm creatures fled one by one, and even fled from the True Dragon Sea as soon as possible.

If there is a race, just flee with the whole race and go to other places to watch.

In short, when they didn't understand the situation, they didn't dare to stay in the real dragon sea.

......

Soon.

The other top overlord-level forces were shocked when they all knew that the True Dragon Cave Heaven had fallen.

Many top overlord-level forces such as the Chaos Cave, Xishan, and Feather Alliance have also sent out the Bone Transformation Realm to discuss the situation.

As for the cultivators' side, the top overlord-level forces such as the Taigu Mountain, the Ice and Snow Cave, and the Dark Sea naturally didn't pay attention to this matter, and the destruction of the True Dragon Cave Heaven was only good for them, not harmful.

Of course.

They were also a little curious, who had the strength to destroy the True Dragon Cave Heaven.

It didn't take long for the information to come out.

The one who destroys the true dragon cave and the lord of the endless.

All of a sudden, a Bone Transformation Realm summoned Ye Tian to ask why he wanted to destroy the True Dragon Cave Heaven.

And Ye Tian also gave an answer.

"The Lord of the True Dragon has led a number of bone transformation realms to trouble me, trying to rob me of my resources. "

As soon as Ye Tian said this, the other top overlord-level forces didn't dare to care.

In short, Ye Tian has a reason to make a move, not for no reason.

Therefore, they didn't have to be afraid of Ye Tian making a move on them.

Besides, they don't dare to care!

Ye Tian has the strength to kill the Lord of the True Dragon, and when the Lord of the Ruins does not come back, he has the strength to kill them, unless they join forces, there is hope to confront Ye Tian.

......

Wanlong territorial waters.

The Lord of Darkness came to visit Ye Tian.

"Lord of Endless, your current strength is too strong, even the Lord of the True Dragon has been killed by you!"

The Lord of Darkness sighed.

"I was lucky enough to break through to the Fourth Bone Transformation Realm, and I am naturally stronger than the True Dragon Lord!" Ye Tian said.

"Envy!"

The Lord of Darkness.

Soon.

The Lord of Darkness has spoken out for his purpose.

"Lord of Endless, it is rumored that you have entered the land of the Eternal Shore, can you tell us a little bit about the land of the Eternal Land?" asked the Lord of Darkness.

He didn't know anything about the Eternal Lands, so he wanted to ask.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian didn't hide it, and directly told the Lord of Darkness a little information about the land on the other side of eternity.

Soon, after the Lord of Darkness obtained this information, his face suddenly changed.

"Endless Lord, you said that in the land of the other side of eternity, any eternal true beast is a fourth-time bone transformation realm, a fifth-stage bone transformation realm, or even a sixth-stage bone transformation realm?"

The Lord of Darkness was shocked.

"Yes!" Ye Tiandao.

"Then I'd better forget it!"

The Lord of Darkness does not dare to go to the land of eternity, otherwise he will seek death!

He didn't think that his luck would be so good, once he went to the land of eternity, he probably didn't live many days.

Subsequently, he took his leave.

He decided to manage the Dark Sea honestly in the future, anyway, the Dark Sea still has a strong person like the Endless Lord, and no one dares to destroy the Dark Sea.

So, he doesn't have to worry about security.

Not long after the Lord of Darkness left, another Bone Transformation Realm arrived.

"The Lord of Endless, the Lord of the Void is here!"

The current image of the Lord of the Cave Void is a white-haired man, and after seeing Ye Tian, he first boasted about Ye Tian.

"Lord of the Void, you probably also want to ask for information about the land on the other side of eternity, right?"

Ye Tian directly interrupted and asked.

"Ahem, yes!"

The Lord of the Void nodded slightly.

"Here you go!"

Ye Tian transmitted the information of the land on the other side of eternity to the Lord of the Cave Void.

The Lord of the Cave Void received the information, browsed it, and immediately understood something.

"The land beyond the Eternal Shore is dangerous, but it's also wonderful!"

The Lord of the Void decided to take an adventure.
